generalElectives.label: General Electives
generalElectives.note: 6 credit hours fulfilled by taking any two of the cross-listed courses in the three program areas, or by taking PAX 390 Directed Readings in Peace Studies.

courses.title: Any two cross-listed program-area courses, or PAX 390 Directed Readings in Peace Studies
